task_completion.description: Locate the 'Fells_Survey' route in Garmin BaseCamp
task_completion.visual_evidence: Garmin BaseCamp window is active with 'Fells_Survey' visible in the data list or map view.

task_completion.description: Open the properties/details for the 'Fells_Survey' route
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box or properties pane specifically for the 'Fells_Survey' route is open.

task_completion.description: Insert the 'Water Cache' waypoint into the route
task_completion.visual_evidence: 'Water Cache' is visible in the list of waypoints/points within the 'Fells_Survey' route properties.

task_completion.description: Ensure 'Water Cache' is positioned between 'South Gate' and 'Bear Hill'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sequence of points in the route properties list strictly shows 'South Gate' followed by 'Water Cache', followed by 'Bear Hill'.

task_completion.description: Update the route's Activity Profile to 'Hiking' or 'Pedestrian'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Activity Profile dropdown or setting in the route properties is changed to 'Hiking' or 'Pedestrian'.

task_completion.description: Export the modified route as a GPX file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog or file explorer shows the file being saved as 'updated_survey_route.gpx' in the 'C:\workspace\output\' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to modify the route
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Garmin BaseCamp menus and dialogs, not terminal commands or scripts modifying GPX files.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's export functionality
integrity.visual_evidence: The file save dialog is triggered from within Garmin BaseCamp (e.g., File -> Export), rather than creating a file from scratch.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually edit GPX XML data
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad or VS Code) are shown open with GPX XML data being manually typed or copy-pasted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected output path: C:\workspace\output\updated_survey_route.gpx. Expected route name: Fells_Survey. Expected waypoint sequence: South Gate -> Water Cache -> Bear Hill. Expected activity profiles: Hiking or Pedestrian.
